rationale: Section 11.24 governs optional historic-site exemptions granted by taxing units. The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) does not affect or interact with §11.24 in any way.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit by official action of the body adopted in the manner required by law for official actions may exempt from taxation part or all of the assessed value of a structure or archeological site
_note: No conflict. §11.24 (historic sites) is unrelated to the proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
